//: Copy to server/sandbox.config.json (or set CCSERVER_SANDBOX_CONFIG) to customize the sandbox.
//docker: true (default): start an isolated rootless dockerd inside the sandbox. false: no docker (lighter, no rootlesskit).
//binds: Extra host paths exposed inside the sandbox, on top of the project dir + ~/.claude + ~/.claude.json. mode: 'ro' (default) or 'rw'. Missing sources are skipped. ~ expands to your home. NOTE: sources under /run/user/* may be unavailable when docker is on (rootlesskit copies-up /run); keys under your home (~/.ssh, ~/.gnupg, ~/.config/gh) work fine.
